evals.prompt: The data table on our admin page looks messy — headers don't line up with the values underneath, and the right-aligned currency columns feel disconnected from their headers. Can you neaten it up?
expectations: Removes right-alignment from all currency / percentage / numeric columns and centres them
Identifies long-text columns (address, name, notes) as exceptions that stay left-aligned
Mentions inline-flex requirement for cell content wrappers

evals.prompt: I need to build a new properties table for a client agency project. It'll have address, city, state, zip, county, asking price, ARV, yield, and a status badge column. What's the right pattern?
expectations: Address + city + county + status all centre header; address cell left-aligned, others centred
asking_price / ARV / yield cells centred (not right-aligned)
USPS Pub 28 suffix abbreviation applied to address rendering
Subtle vertical dividers in body rows only, 15% opacity

evals.prompt: I want to build a dashboard of KPI cards — like 4 big numbers with deltas across the top of the screen. How should I lay it out?
